name: CappedDamage
author: varla
description: xOBSE port (original 32-bit Oblivion) of the OBSE64 capped-player-to-enemy-damage plugin. Caps health loss on any non-player actor to 1/3 of its max health per rolling 3-second window. Prevents one-shot kills; damage is clamped before it is applied. Hooks Character/Creature vtable[0xA9] DamageAV_F; player exempt.
